content: Add analyze_batch_stream() async generator using litellm stream=True with incremental JSON-array parsing
Convert /analyze to NDJSON streaming when Accept: application/x-ndjson is requested
Update frontend analyzeItemImage to consume NDJSON via fetch + onItem callback
Wire AddItem.jsx to incrementally render cards as items arrive
Lint + restart + measure perceived first-card latency vs the 17s batched baseline
